scope: Only official APIs, open-platform permissions, service-market authorization, or customer-owned web entry points are considered valid. Personal-account hooks, group-control tools, browser automation, simulated clicks, and reverse-engineered IM protocols are excluded from commercial delivery.

current_system_summary.important_boundary: The current code can run a website sandbox Copilot chain and can store official-channel connector/webhook contracts, but it does not send real messages to WeCom, WeChat Official Account, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, Taobao, JD, Pinduoduo, or any other external platform.

channels.current_system_status: P3-04 has a signed website sandbox inbound chain, trusted message creation, AI draft orchestration, human review, outbox draft, and blocked connector send plan. Real external write remains disabled.
required_before_real_test: Real signing secret stored outside source code
Explicit auto-reply policy for low-risk FAQ only
official_sources: Customer-owned channel; no third-party platform permission required
channels.commercial_conclusion: This is the safest first pilot entry, but current state is still Copilot/manual-confirmation first, not unattended production auto-reply.

channels.display_name: 企业微信客服 / 微信客服
channels.current_system_status: Provider contract and fixture verifier exist. Current code has SHA1 fixture verification and trusted-inbound pipeline hooks, but production AES decrypt, official send API, access token lifecycle, service-state handling, and real receipt reconciliation are not implemented.
required_before_real_test: 客服账号, 接待人员, and customer-service link configured
AES decrypt and message schema mapping
Access token refresh and error-code mapping
Rate limit, retry, receipt, and kill switch
channels.commercial_conclusion: Can be a priority official channel, but not yet connected in our system. Do not promise WeCom auto-reply until an official sandbox account is tested end to end.

channels.display_name: 微信公众号 / 服务号客服消息
channels.current_system_status: Provider contract and fixture verifier exist. Current code supports fixture SHA1 verification, but production secure-mode decrypt, passive reply timing, customer-service message window handling, and official send API are not implemented.
required_before_real_test: Verified service account or official account developer access
Server URL, Token, and optional EncodingAESKey
channels.commercial_conclusion: Officially feasible, but constrained by account type, user interaction window, message type, and response timing. It should be sold as an official-account connector after sandbox verification, not as unrestricted proactive messaging.

channels.display_name: 抖音开放平台私信 / 企业号私信
channels.current_system_status: No provider contract, verifier, event parser, token manager, send adapter, or UI configuration exists in our code.
required_before_real_test: Open Douyin app and account authorization
Risk policy for marketing, sensitive content, and human fallback
channels.commercial_conclusion: Official auto-reply is possible for approved account/application scenarios, but current system has zero Douyin connector implementation. First deliver as Copilot/readiness plan, then build official sandbox.

channels.current_system_status: No provider contract, verifier, event parser, order context integration, send adapter, or service-market packaging exists in our code.
required_before_real_test: Merchant test shop or service-provider qualification
Whether conversation message send API is open to this app
channels.commercial_conclusion: Do not sell as guaranteed fully automatic Feige reply before permission confirmation. Safer initial mode is order/after-sale Copilot plus human confirmation.

channels.display_name: 小红书专业号 / 商业开放平台私信
channels.current_system_status: No provider contract, verifier, event parser, token manager, send adapter, or official tool-app packaging exists in our code.
required_before_real_test: Professional account or business platform authorization
Webhook/event and send-message API documentation from the official console
Token, signature, idempotency, and content-risk policy
Human confirmation for commerce, refund, medical, legal, and brand-risk content
channels.commercial_conclusion: Public sources confirm official business/open-platform routes and third-party private-message tooling, but not enough to promise universal automatic private-message reply. Treat as partner/permission-gated.

channels.display_name: 淘宝 / 天猫 / 千牛 / 店小蜜
channels.current_system_status: No provider contract, verifier, order/buyer identity mapping, send adapter, service-market app, or Qianniu panel plugin exists in our code.
required_before_real_test: Clear confirmation whether chat send is available to this app
Message compliance and after-sale human-review policy
No browser automation or simulated Qianniu operation
channels.commercial_conclusion: Do not promise generic Taobao/Tmall automatic chat send without official service-market permission. A defensible path is customer-panel Copilot, knowledge suggestion, and human-confirmed replies first.

channels.current_system_status: No provider contract, verifier, JOS auth, send adapter, or order-context mapping exists in our code.
required_before_real_test: JD JOS app and shop authorization
客服机器人基础包 or relevant message API permission
Dingdong/Dongdong message send and callback contract
Rate limit, error code, review, and audit policy
channels.commercial_conclusion: Likely feasible only after permission-package approval. Current system is not connected; sell as later standard/enterprise connector, not Lite default.

channels.current_system_status: No provider contract, verifier, PDD auth, message API adapter, or order-context mapping exists in our code.
required_before_real_test: Official customer-service message API documentation from the app console
No browser automation, simulated clicks, or unofficial workbench control
channels.commercial_conclusion: Publicly accessible sources did not verify a general official customer-service chat send API. Do not promise automatic reply until official permission and API docs are obtained inside the merchant/developer console.
